ddls:
CREATE TABLE "carts" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the cart */,
  "guest_session_id" TEXT /* Guest session ID for guest carts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cart was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cart (e.g., active, abandoned, purchased) */,
  "abandoned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cart was abandoned */,
  "total_items" INTEGER /* Total number of items in the cart */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of items in the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_items" (
  "cart_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cart the item belongs to */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book added to the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book added to the cart */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the book */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the book (quantity * unit_price) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was added to the cart */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the item was last updated in the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last performed an activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book in stock */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the book */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, digital) */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the book */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the book's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES book_categories ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_item_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "cart_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cart item being logged */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., add, update, delete) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book involved in the action */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the book involved in the action */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the book involved in the action */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_item_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_item_logs_cart_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_item_id") REFERENCES cart_items ("cart_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_status_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change entry */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cart being logged */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the cart */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the cart */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status change occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_status_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_status_changes_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_merge_logs" (
  "merge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merge log entry */,
  "guest_cart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest cart being merged */,
  "user_cart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user cart being merged into */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the merge operation was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the merge operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_merge_logs_user_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_merge_logs_guest_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_merge_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the book category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the book category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the address */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cart used to place the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the book in the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the book in the order (quantity * unit_price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
